dental.subject: Online patient booking for {business_name}
dental.body:
Hi there,

I was looking at your practice online and noticed that your website ({website_url}) might be running on an older platform and doesn't offer a smooth online booking experience for mobile patients.

We recently developed a responsive, premium booking and automatic patient reminder system designed specifically for dental practices. It helps capture more patient bookings and reduces no-shows by up to 30%.

You can see our live booking demo here:
{promo_url}

If you'd be open to seeing how this can be tailored to {business_name}, let me know when is a good time to speak.

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi

derm.subject: Modernizing patient bookings & reminders at {business_name}
derm.body:
Hi there,

I was browsing your clinic's web page ({website_url}) and noticed that it doesn't currently offer real-time patient booking or automatic appointment reminders.

We've built a premium patient scheduler and reminder engine specifically tailored for dermatology clinics. It simplifies scheduling for your staff and automatically texts/emails patients before their appointment to eliminate no-shows.

Have a look at our dermatological system demo here:
{promo_url}

I'd love to chat briefly about how we can integrate this into {business_name}. Do you have 5 minutes for a call sometime this week?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
